name: HRA_GLOBAL_TRANSFER_REQUESTS
description: This table stores the global transfer request related to performance management as a result of GHR global transfer process.

columns.Name: GLOBAL_TRANSFER_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the primary key of the global transfer request.

columns.Name: REQUEST_HEADER_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the primary key of the GHR global transfer request.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the worker person identifier of the global transfer request.

columns.Name: OLD_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the old worker assignment identifier of the global transfer request.

columns.Name: NEW_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the new worker assignment identifier of the global transfer request.

columns.Name: NEW_MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the new manager person identifier of the global transfer request.

columns.Name: NEW_MGR_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the new manager assignment identifier of the global transfer request.

columns.Name: REQUEST_EFFECTIVE_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the effective date of the global transfer request.

columns.Name: ALL_REVIEW_PERIODS
columns.Comments: Indicate the review period option of the global transfer request.

columns.Name: REVIEW_PERIOD_IDS
columns.Comments: Stores the list of review period identifiers of the global transfer request.

columns.Name: MGR_OF_NEW_LINE_MGR
columns.Comments: Indicate whether the submitter is the manager of new line manager of the global transfer request.

columns.Name: MODULE_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Stores the module identifier of the global transfer request.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
